creator: zgabor@code.hu
text:
1) the logname and uprocp keywords are illegal
	(maybe others too, from the ``not NEWVM'' section)
	2) missing the AT&T's -f option (it's about:
	-o 'user=UID pid ppid cpu=C start=STIME tty time command')
	3) it would be better, to list the columns only once, if I use
	two parameters, wich generate some common column.
	(Eg: ps -jl, or like).  Yes, I know about the -o/-O option.
